You tried to call a tool with arguments that do not match that tool's actual required inputs.

Tool name:
{tool_name}

You provided arguments:
{provided_arguments}

Please:
1) Compare your argument keys against the tool schema returned in retrieval results.
2) Rewrite the <tool_call> so that the "arguments" object uses exactly the required parameter names.
3) If you still do not have all required information, gather it first with other tools.
